title: UnifoLM-OminiA-0.3 Released by Yushu Tech, Enabling Multi-task Autonomous Execution in Humanoid Robots
excerpt: Unifollm-OminiA-0.3, a general intelligent model for humanoid robots, was recently released by ZOOX Technology. This model supports multimodal interaction and u
content_html:
Unifollm-OminiA-0.3, a general intelligent model for humanoid robots, was recently released by ZOOX Technology. This model supports multimodal interaction and understanding, and can coordinate tasks across multiple scenarios such as home and elderly care, achieving a complete closed-loop from environmental perception, task understanding to autonomous execution.

According to the demonstration video released by ZOOX Technology, the humanoid robot G1 equipped with this model can perform various practical tasks, including moving a floor pillow to a sofa, identifying the color and quantity of items, precisely picking up a specified medicine box, organizing clothes, placing a dish in a dishwasher, and adjusting the height of a hospital bed.

In terms of interaction capabilities, Unifollm-OminiA-0.3 supports visual recognition and language understanding, enabling the robot to plan complex tasks based on user instructions. For example, the robot can identify three boxes of medicines of different colors and retrieve the medicine box at the specified location. Meanwhile, during device control, when users issue commands such as "stop," the robot can immediately halt its actions.

This model represents an important advancement for ZOOX Technology in integrating AGI (Artificial General Intelligence) and physical AI technologies on the humanoid robot G1 platform, further enhancing the robot's adaptability and task execution capabilities in real environments.

As the embodied intelligence industry develops rapidly, competition in the robotics field is shifting from purely hardware performance to a comprehensive capability of "model + perception + action." The release of Unifollm-OminiA-0.3 indicates that domestic humanoid robots are accelerating toward multi-scenario autonomous applications.

sentences.zh: ZOOX科技近期发布了仿人机器人通用智能模型Unifollm-OminiA-0.3。

sentences.en: This model supports multimodal interaction and understanding, and can coordinate tasks across multiple scenarios such as home and elderly care, achieving a complete closed-loop from environmental perception, task understanding to autonomous execution.
sentences.zh: 该模型支持多模态交互和理解，可以协调家庭、养老等多个场景的任务，实现从环境感知、任务理解到自主执行的完整闭环。

For example, the robot can identify three boxes of medicines of different colors and retrieve the medicine box at the specified location. Meanwhile, during device control, when users issue commands such as "stop," the robot can immediately halt its actions.

sentences.zh: 例如，机器人可以识别三箱不同颜色的药品，并在指定位置取回药箱。

sentences.en: Meanwhile, during device control, when users issue commands such as "stop," the robot can immediately halt its actions.
sentences.zh: 同时，在设备控制过程中，当用户发出“停止”等命令时，机器人可以立即停止动作。

blocks.html_en: This model represents an important advancement for ZOOX Technology in integrating AGI (Artificial General Intelligence) and physical AI technologies on the humanoid robot G1 platform, further enhancing the robot's adaptability and task execution capabilities in real environments.

sentences.en: This model represents an important advancement for ZOOX Technology in integrating AGI (Artificial General Intelligence) and physical AI technologies on the humanoid robot G1 platform, further enhancing the robot's adaptability and task execution capabilities in real environments.
sentences.zh: 该模型代表了ZOOX Technology在人形机器人G1平台上集成AGI（通用人工智能）和物理AI技术的重要进展，进一步增强了机器人在现实环境中的适应能力和任务执行能力。

blocks.html_en: As the embodied intelligence industry develops rapidly, competition in the robotics field is shifting from purely hardware performance to a comprehensive capability of "model + perception + action." The release of Unifollm-OminiA-0.3 indicates that domestic humanoid robots are accelerating toward multi-scenario autonomous applications.

sentences.en: As the embodied intelligence industry develops rapidly, competition in the robotics field is shifting from purely hardware performance to a comprehensive capability of "model + perception + action."
sentences.zh: 随着体身智能产业的快速发展，机器人领域的竞争正在从纯粹的硬件性能转向“模型+感知+行动”的综合能力。

sentences.en: The release of Unifollm-OminiA-0.3 indicates that domestic humanoid robots are accelerating toward multi-scenario autonomous applications.
sentences.zh: Unifollm-OminiA-0.3的发布，标志着国产仿人机器人正在加速走向多场景自主应用。

content_html_zh:
ZOOX科技近期发布了仿人机器人通用智能模型Unifollm-OminiA-0.3。 该模型支持多模态交互和理解，可以协调家庭、养老等多个场景的任务，实现从环境感知、任务理解到自主执行的完整闭环。

根据ZOOX科技发布的演示视频，搭载该模型的人形机器人G1可以执行各种实际任务，包括将地枕搬到沙发上、识别物品的颜色和数量、精确拾取指定的药箱、整理衣服、将盘子放入洗碗机、调整病床的高度等。

在交互能力方面，Unifollm-OminiA-0.3支持视觉识别和语言理解，使机器人能够根据用户指令规划复杂的任务。 例如，机器人可以识别三箱不同颜色的药品，并在指定位置取回药箱。 同时，在设备控制过程中，当用户发出“停止”等命令时，机器人可以立即停止动作。

该模型代表了ZOOX Technology在人形机器人G1平台上集成AGI（通用人工智能）和物理AI技术的重要进展，进一步增强了机器人在现实环境中的适应能力和任务执行能力。

随着体身智能产业的快速发展，机器人领域的竞争正在从纯粹的硬件性能转向“模型+感知+行动”的综合能力。 Unifollm-OminiA-0.3的发布，标志着国产仿人机器人正在加速走向多场景自主应用。
